pages.text: Appears in:$(li)Kamen Rider Zeztz (2025, TV show)$(br2)Equipped alongside the $(l:zeztz/devices/armor)Zeztz armor$(/l) to transform into $(l:zeztz/riders/zeztz_exdream)Kamen Rider Zeztz Exdream

Upgraded from the $(l:zeztz/devices/zeztz_driver)Zeztz Driver$(/l) by using the $(l:zeztz/items/zeztz_exdream_driver_buckle)Zeztz Exdream Driver Buckle$(/l) template and $(l:zeztz/items/capsems#exdreamrise_capsem)Exdreamrise Capsem$(/l) in a smithing table
